name: vellum-extension
description: Chrome MV3 extension that detects invisible Unicode watermarks in web page text.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run check && mkdir -p dist/content dist/background dist/popup && esbuild content/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=chrome120 --outfile=dist/content/content.js && esbuild background/background.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=chrome120 --outfile=dist/background/background.js && esbuild popup/popup.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=chrome120 --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp popup/popup.html popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && cp -R icons dist/icons
